slides.title: Brand Identity at a Glance
body: Precise
Authoritative
Intelligent
Urgent
Premium
Visual style: dark-mode enterprise editorial
First impression: controlled confidence

slides.title: Core Positioning
body: One-liner: AI-native data security for enterprises in every environment
ICP: Enterprise CISOs and security leaders in regulated industries
Pain point: AI breaks your old defenses — legacy tools weren't built for this
Category: DSPM expanding toward AI Security platform ownership

slides.title: Messaging Architecture
body: H1: Protect your data. Secure AI.
H2: AI breaks your old defenses
H2: One platform to secure AI — from data to access to action
H2: Protect and comply at scale by making data and AI security highly actionable

slides.title: GTM Motion & CTA Strategy
body: GTM type: Enterprise Sales-Led (SLG) with thin PLG hook
Primary CTA: Get a demo — pure account-based motion
Funnel signal: AI Security Pulse Check warms cold ICPs before demo ask
Trust approach: Paramount case study before conversion request
Friction level: 10+ field form — high intent qualification

slides.title: Visual Identity
body: Illustration style: Abstract data visualization — nodes, flows, classification layers
Animation intent: Ambient intelligence — make invisible security feel alive
Emotional register: Controlled confidence, premium enterprise
Visual weight: Light to medium — nothing jarring or dramatic

slides.title: Animation Stack
body: Primary library: GSAP + GSAP ScrollTrigger + GSAP SplitText
Also: Lottie for feature illustrations, Swiper for carousels
Scroll animations: ~70% of all animations fire on scroll entry
Load animations: ~20% hero entrance sequence on page load
Easing: cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1) — Material Design standard, no spring physics

slides.title: 3 Animation Techniques to Steal
body: 1. SplitText word reveal — each word enters staggered, makes headlines feel like revelation
2. Lavender hover feedback — brand color fills interactive surfaces on hover at .4s ease
3. Dark wedge section — scroll past hero into threat framing breaks visitor's mental model

slides.title: Illustration System Deep Dive
body: Style: Abstract geometric — network nodes and data flows, no literal UI screenshots
Color usage: 5-7 hues, all from brand token system — illustrations ARE the brand palette
Built for animation: Yes — Lottie files built in After Effects with named pre-comps
Depth technique: Opacity-layered pale-purple fills over dark-violet base

slides.title: What to Steal / What to Avoid
body: ✓ Steal: Dual-CTA architecture — demo + free assessment meets buyers at different funnel stages
✓ Steal: Deep violet + heliotrope color system — distinctive in a sea of blue enterprise SaaS
✓ Steal: AI breaks your old defenses wedge — category repositioning through named threat
✗ Avoid: 10+ field demo form — high friction kills conversion even in enterprise
✗ Avoid: Headline spaces lost in SplitText animation — legibility risk on mobile

slides.title: How to Replicate This Design System
body: Style rule: Abstract geometric forms — nodes, connections, no human characters or UI screenshots
Color system: 1 dark anchor + 1 luminous glow + 2 pale tints + 1 success accent
Animation rule: Lottie for hero, GSAP ScrollTrigger snap for scroll reveals, nothing faster than 300ms
Tool: Figma for SVGs, After Effects + Bodymovin for Lottie, GSAP Club for ScrollTrigger + SplitText
Build first: One hero Lottie animation — this delivers 60% of the total visual impact

slides.title: Competitive Signals
body: Category owned: DSPM — expanding narrative toward AI Security before competitors pivot
Benchmarks: Wiz (aesthetic + one platform), Varonis (data security), BigID (DSPM), Securiti.ai
JTBD framing: Show the board we are AI-ready without slowing the business down
Key differentiator: Only platform securing both data AND AI in a single unified surface

slides.quote: Cyera is the AI-native data security platform built for a world where AI makes old defenses obsolete — targeting enterprise security leaders who need to govern data and AI risk simultaneously from a single intelligent platform.
